description: UK platform connecting patients with dermatologists for online consultations and prescription skincare. Niche focus on dermatology with B2C and B2B2C models through employer benefits.
business_model: B2C - Direct to consumers; B2B2C through employers and insurers
target_market: UK consumers seeking dermatology care; employers adding to benefits
competitive_advantage: Specialist dermatology focus, quick access, premium positioning

varden_fit.rationale: Specialist add-on service - could integrate with occupational health for skin conditions
